description_fr: Coca-Cola Zero saveur Oreo et biscuits Oreo saveur Coca, plus playlist Spotify partagee, lances dans 35 pays sous la campagne 'Besties'.
description_en: Oreo-flavored Coca-Cola Zero and Coca-Cola-flavored Oreo cookies, plus a shared Spotify playlist, launched in 35 countries as the 'Besties' campaign.
outcome_signal: 75M impressions across 8 social platforms; limited run

description_fr: Collection cocottes, bouilloire Pikachu et vaisselle sous licence Pokemon, deux drops (juillet/novembre 2024), Japon/Asie/Oceanie puis US 2025.
description_en: Licensed Pokemon cookware line incl. Pikachu kettle and tableware, two drops (Jul/Nov 2024), Japan/Asia/Oceania then US in 2025.
outcome_signal: High demand, items resold on secondary markets

description_fr: Partenariat promotionnel Nissan x Detective Pikachu : placement de vehicules (LEAF, Juke) et campagnes co-brandees autour du film.
description_en: Nissan x Detective Pikachu promo partnership: vehicle placement (LEAF, Juke) and co-branded campaigns around the film launch.

description_fr: OKX (crypto) devient Primary Partner du McLaren F1, branding sur sidepods et livrees speciales depuis 2022.
description_en: Crypto exchange OKX became a McLaren F1 Primary Partner, with sidepod branding and special liveries from 2022.

description_fr: Google intégré Android/Chrome puis Gemini AI sur les McLaren F1 ; tech embarquee pour comms pilotes et analyse arrets au stand.
description_en: Google integrates Android/Chrome then Gemini AI on McLaren F1 cars; tech powers driver comms and pit-stop analysis.

description_fr: Ere McLaren-Mercedes en F1 et co-développement de la supercar SLR McLaren, alliance moteur et marque sur ~20 ans.
description_en: McLaren-Mercedes F1 era and co-developed SLR McLaren supercar, an engine and brand alliance over ~20 years.

description_fr: Apple finance créateurs/cineastes pour tourner films et clips 'Shot on iPhone' diffuses sur YouTube et en pub.
description_en: Apple commissions creators/filmmakers to shoot 'Shot on iPhone' films and clips distributed on YouTube and in ads.

description_fr: Red Bull sponsorise athletes extrêmes et produit son propre média (vidéos, événements) plutot que d'acheter de la pub classique.
description_en: Red Bull sponsors extreme athletes and runs its own media house (video, events) instead of buying traditional advertising.
outcome_signal: Stratos jump: ~8M concurrent YouTube live viewers (2012)
source_note: Red Bull Media House / Stratos record

description_fr: Red Bull possede son ecurie F1, plateforme média et marketing permanente plutot que simple sponsoring.
description_en: Red Bull owns its own F1 team, a permanent media and marketing platform rather than mere sponsorship.

description_fr: NordVPN sponsorise massivement des YouTubers (lectures integrees) sur modèle CPM/affiliation, niche-agnostique, 100+ collabs/mois.
description_en: NordVPN heavily sponsors YouTubers via in-video reads on a CPM/affiliate model, niche-agnostic, 100+ collabs/month.
outcome_signal: ~$12.2M YouTube spend in 2022, est. 4.4B views; 3,000+ creators

description_fr: Premier 'Famous Order' depuis 30 ans : repas signature Travis Scott + merch streetwear co-brande.
description_en: First celebrity 'Famous Order' in 30 years: a Travis Scott signature meal plus co-branded streetwear merch.
outcome_signal: Shortages nationwide; app DAU +26%; quarterly US sales lift

description_fr: Repas BTS lance dans ~50 pays, premier 'Famous Order' mondial, avec merch dédié.
description_en: BTS Meal launched in ~50 countries, the first global 'Famous Order', with dedicated merch.
outcome_signal: $98M incremental sales; global comp sales +40.5% Q2 2021

description_fr: McDonald's licencie des IP (Disney, Marvel, jouets) pour les jouets Happy Meal, moteur de trafic familles depuis 1979.
description_en: McDonald's licenses IP (Disney, Marvel, toys) for Happy Meal toys, a family traffic driver since 1979.
outcome_signal: Largest toy distributor in the world (billions of toys/yr)

description_fr: Latte 'parfum sauce' infuse au baijiu Moutai, lance dans 10 800 boutiques chinoises avec packaging co-brande.
description_en: Moutai baijiu-infused 'sauce-flavor' latte, launched across 10,800 Chinese stores with co-branded packaging.
outcome_signal: 5.42M cups & RMB100M+ on day one; 45.83M cups in 2023

description_fr: Boisson 'Fendi Joy Yellow' à 19 yuans avec gobelets et goodies Fendi, démocratisant le luxe pour la Gen Z chinoise.
description_en: 'Fendi Joy Yellow' drink at 19 yuan with Fendi cups and merch, bringing luxury to China's Gen Z.
outcome_signal: Sold out day 1; 1.5M+ cups in 3 days; #heyteafendi 70M Weibo views

description_fr: Pop Mart licencie l'IP Labubu de l'artiste Kasing Lung en blind boxes, devenu phénomène mondial Gen Z.
description_en: Pop Mart licenses artist Kasing Lung's Labubu IP into blind boxes, now a global Gen Z phenomenon.
outcome_signal: The Monsters RMB3.04B in 2024 (+726% YoY), 23.3% of revenue

description_fr: Collection capsule streetwear x luxe (vestes, sacs monogramme rouge) vendue en pop-ups ephemeres.
description_en: Streetwear-meets-luxury capsule (red monogram bags, jackets) sold via temporary pop-ups.
outcome_signal: Long queues, instant sellouts, high resale premiums

description_fr: Ligne Yeezy co-créée avec Kanye West, sneakers en drops limites, royalties au créateur.
description_en: Yeezy line co-created with Kanye West, limited sneaker drops with royalties to the creator.

description_fr: Sneakers Air Jordan/Air Force reinterpretes par Travis Scott (swoosh inverse), drops ultra-limites.
description_en: Air Jordan/Air Force sneakers reworked by Travis Scott (reverse swoosh), ultra-limited drops.
outcome_signal: Instant sellouts; major secondary-market resale premiums

description_fr: Air Jordan : marque dédiée co-construite avec l'athlete, royalties à vie, devenue sous-marque Jordan Brand.
description_en: Air Jordan: a dedicated brand built with the athlete, lifetime royalties, now the Jordan Brand sub-label.

description_fr: Partenariat de contenu/équité : GoPro fournit la captation, Red Bull les événements ; co-production et partage de droits média.
description_en: Content/equity partnership: GoPro supplies capture tech, Red Bull the events; co-produced media and shared rights.

description_fr: Spotify acquiert l'exclusivité du Joe Rogan Expérience pour ancrer sa stratégie podcast.
description_en: Spotify secured exclusive rights to The Joe Rogan Experience to anchor its podcast strategy.

description_fr: Concert virtuel 'Astronomical' in-game, co-créé avec Travis Scott, plus skins et emotes.
description_en: In-game 'Astronomical' virtual concert co-created with Travis Scott, plus skins and emotes.

description_fr: Skins et événements Marvel (Avengers, Nexus War) sous licence dans Fortnite.
description_en: Licensed Marvel skins and events (Avengers, Nexus War) inside Fortnite.

description_fr: Sets LEGO sous licence Star Wars, l'une des gammes licenciees les plus durables et rentables.
description_en: Licensed LEGO Star Wars sets, one of the most durable and profitable licensed lines.
outcome_signal: One of LEGO's top-selling licensed themes for 25+ years

description_fr: Collections UT t-shirts avec l'artiste KAWS, drops accessibles declenchant des ruees en magasin.
description_en: UT t-shirt collections with artist KAWS, accessible drops that triggered in-store rushes.
outcome_signal: Sellouts in minutes; viral crowd scenes in Asia

description_fr: Collection MARKERAD co-concue avec Virgil Abloh, objets déco a typographie signature.
description_en: MARKERAD collection co-designed with Virgil Abloh, decor pieces with signature typography.
outcome_signal: Sold out rapidly; strong resale demand

description_fr: Quencher Stanley x Starbucks en édition limitée vendu chez Target, viralité TikTok.
description_en: Limited-edition Stanley x Starbucks Quencher sold at Target, fueled by TikTok virality.
outcome_signal: Sold out within hours; resale spikes

description_fr: Crocs plateforme et stiletto par Balenciaga, repositionnant la marque dans la mode haut de gamme.
description_en: Platform and stiletto Crocs by Balenciaga, repositioning the brand into high fashion.
outcome_signal: Platform Crocs sold out pre-release; brand halo effect

description_fr: Air Force 1 1837 noire a swoosh Tiffany Blue plus accessoires en argent sterling co-brandes.
description_en: Black Air Force 1 1837 with a Tiffany Blue swoosh plus co-branded sterling silver accessories.
outcome_signal: Sold out; polarizing but high media reach

description_fr: Collection outdoor co-brandee Gucci x The North Face, motifs vintage et campagne immersive.
description_en: Co-branded Gucci x The North Face outdoor collection with vintage prints and an immersive campaign.
outcome_signal: Items sold out online; strong Gen Z engagement

description_fr: Capsules annuelles avec maisons de luxe (Karl Lagerfeld, Balmain, Versace) démocratisant le design.
description_en: Annual capsules with luxury houses (Karl Lagerfeld, Balmain, Versace) democratizing designer fashion.

description_fr: Marque beauté co-fondée par Rihanna et LVMH, inclusivité des teintes comme positionnement.
description_en: Beauty brand co-founded by Rihanna and LVMH, shade inclusivity as core positioning.

description_fr: Boisson lancée par les YouTubers KSI et Logan Paul, monetisant directement leur audience.
description_en: Beverage launched by YouTubers KSI and Logan Paul, directly monetizing their audience.

description_fr: Marque de chocolat fondée par MrBeast, promue via ses vidéos YouTube a audience massive.
description_en: Chocolate brand founded by MrBeast, promoted through his massive YouTube audience.

description_fr: Marque de café fondée par la YouTubeuse Emma Chamberlain, image lifestyle auprès de la Gen Z.
description_en: Coffee brand founded by YouTuber Emma Chamberlain with a Gen Z lifestyle image.

description_fr: Collections maroquinerie et pret-a-porter a pois avec l'artiste Yayoi Kusama, vitrines immersives mondiales.
description_en: Polka-dot leather goods and RTW collections with artist Yayoi Kusama, immersive global windows.

description_fr: Air Jordan 1 x Dior en édition très limitée, fusion sneaker culture et haute couture.
description_en: Very limited Air Jordan 1 x Dior, fusing sneaker culture and haute couture.
outcome_signal: ~5M people entered lottery for 8,500 pairs; huge resale

description_fr: Balenciaga vend skins in-game et capsule physique parallele dans Fortnite, mode et gaming reunis.
description_en: Balenciaga sold in-game skins plus a parallel physical capsule in Fortnite, merging fashion and gaming.

description_fr: Boutique virtuelle et vêtements digitaux Ralph Lauren sur Roblox pour toucher la Gen Z.
description_en: Ralph Lauren virtual storefront and digital apparel on Roblox to reach Gen Z.

description_fr: Espaces Gucci Garden/Town sur Roblox avec items digitaux ; un sac virtuel revendu plus cher que le réel.
description_en: Gucci Garden/Town spaces on Roblox with digital items; a virtual bag resold above its physical price.
outcome_signal: Virtual Dionysus bag resold for ~$4,115 (above retail)

description_fr: Burberry habille un personnage du jeu mobile Honor of Kings avec skins co-concus, cible joueurs chinois.
description_en: Burberry dressed an Honor of Kings mobile character with co-designed skins, targeting Chinese gamers.

description_fr: Luckin licencie le personnage Loopy pour gobelets et goodies, declenchant collectionnite chez les jeunes.
description_en: Luckin licensed the Loopy character for cups and merch, sparking a collecting craze among young consumers.
outcome_signal: Merch sold out in many stores; high social buzz

description_fr: Happy Meals avec cartes Pokemon exclusives en Chine, generant achats massifs et reventes.
description_en: Happy Meals with exclusive Pokemon TCG cards in China, driving heavy purchasing and reselling.
outcome_signal: Reports of scalping/bulk buying; cards resold online

description_fr: Le film Barbie a multiplie licences et co-brandings (Airbnb Malibu Dreamhouse, Crocs, Xbox) en marketing viral.
description_en: The Barbie movie spawned 100+ licenses and co-brandings (Airbnb Dreamhouse, Crocs, Xbox) as viral marketing.

description_fr: Red Bull Stratos : saut stratospherique de Baumgartner, mega-événement média produit en interne.
description_en: Red Bull Stratos: Baumgartner's stratospheric jump, a mega media event produced in-house.
outcome_signal: ~8M concurrent YouTube live viewers (record at the time)

description_fr: Marques gaming (G FUEL, Logitech) sponsorisent streamers Twitch via codes promo et integrations live.
description_en: Gaming brands (G FUEL, Logitech) sponsor Twitch streamers via promo codes and live integrations.

description_fr: Programme Amazon Influencer : créateurs touchent des commissions sur ventes générées via vitrines et liens.
description_en: Amazon Influencer Program: creators earn commissions on sales driven via storefronts and links.

description_fr: Gamme peripheriques Logitech G x Ninja co-brandee avec le streamer Fortnite.
description_en: Co-branded Logitech G x Ninja peripherals line with the Fortnite streamer.

description_fr: Pepsi associe la K-pop BLACKPINK comme égéries pour cibler les marchés asiatiques jeunes.
description_en: Pepsi enlisted K-pop group BLACKPINK as ambassadors to target young Asian markets.

description_fr: Galaxy édition BTS (S20+, Buds) violet co-brandee, mobilisant l'ARMY mondiale.
description_en: Co-branded purple BTS edition Galaxy (S20+, Buds), mobilizing the global ARMY fanbase.
outcome_signal: Sold out in many markets; strong pre-orders

description_fr: Sneakers et sets co-brandes Adidas x LEGO, croisant streetwear et jouet de construction.
description_en: Co-branded Adidas x LEGO sneakers and sets, crossing streetwear and construction toys.

description_fr: Oracle devient sponsor-titre de l'ecurie (Oracle Red Bull Racing), cloud pour la simulation de course.
description_en: Oracle became title sponsor of the team (Oracle Red Bull Racing), cloud powering race simulation.

description_fr: 'Upside Down Whopper' et menu thématique Stranger Things sous licence Netflix.
description_en: 'Upside Down Whopper' and themed menu licensed from Netflix's Stranger Things.
